ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Britta Peterson appeared by zoom for and with Patrick Otellini by zoom.

The court stated that it reviewed the filings regarding the search for heirs and that there was an appropriate amount of diligence. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 26, 2021, is admitted to probate. Patrick Otellini is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for August 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.
